description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: - Links to documentation or discussions related to the actions included in the Executive Document.
- Summaries of the actions included in the Executive Document, created by unbiased and knowledgeable third parties.
- Links to any analysis published by DAO-funded entities regarding the actions in the Executive Document.
- Links to well-maintained resources describing the nature of any parameters that may be changed if the Executive Proposal passes.
The Core Facilitator must ensure that voters have access to sufficient information to make informed decisions. This might include:
to documentation or discussions related to the actions included in the Executive Document.
of the actions included in the Executive Document, created by unbiased and knowledgeable third parties.
published by DAO-funded entities regarding the actions in the Executive Document.
describing the nature of any parameters that may be changed if the Executive Proposal passes.

Providing accessible and complete information is essential to maintaining the legitimacy of the process. Voters should not later regret their vote due to a lack of understanding of the actions they voted on.
